queries.question: Describe the procedures that each hospital offers.
queries.sql: SELECT Procedures.Description  from Hospitals_Procedures join Procedures on Hospitals_Procedures.ProcedureID = Procedures.ProcedureID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Procedures.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID   GROUP BY Hospitals_Procedures.ProcedureID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hospitals_Procedures.HospitalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hospitals)

queries.question: Describe the procedures that each hospital offers.
queries.sql: select hospitals.name , procedures.description from Hospitals_Procedures join Procedures on Hospitals_Procedures.ProcedureID = Procedures.ProcedureID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Procedures.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?hospitals_procedures a :Hospitals_Procedures .
  ?procedures a :Procedures .
  ?hospitals_procedures p:hasProcedures ?procedures .
  ?hospitals a :Hospitals .
  ?hospitals_procedures p:hasHospitals ?hospitals .
  ?hospitals p:name ?name .
  ?procedures p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: what procedure name and description of procedures are available for each hospital?
queries.sql: SELECT Procedures.ProcedureName, Procedures.Description  from Hospitals_Procedures join Procedures on Hospitals_Procedures.ProcedureID = Procedures.ProcedureID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Procedures.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID   GROUP BY Hospitals_Procedures.ProcedureID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hospitals_Procedures.HospitalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hospitals)

queries.question: what procedure name and description of procedures are available for each hospital?
queries.sql: select hospitals.name , procedures.procedurename , procedures.description from Hospitals_Procedures join Procedures on Hospitals_Procedures.ProcedureID = Procedures.ProcedureID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Procedures.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?procedurename ?description WHERE {
  ?hospitals_procedures a :Hospitals_Procedures .

  ?hospitals p:name ?name .
  ?procedures p:ProcedureName ?procedurename .
  ?procedures p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: Show me the procedures every hospital uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Procedures.ProcedureName  from Hospitals_Procedures join Procedures on Hospitals_Procedures.ProcedureID = Procedures.ProcedureID join Hospitals on Hospitals_Procedures.HospitalID = Hospitals.HospitalID   GROUP BY Hospitals_Procedures.ProcedureID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hospitals_Procedures.HospitalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hospitals)
